column5: 2026 AI Predictions: 1) SaaS and agents merge completely - every SaaS becomes agent platform or dies/gets acquired for pennies. 2) Google crushes OpenAI. 3) Outcome-based pricing eating subscriptions = arbitrage opportunity. 4) Micro-companies explode. 5) $1M+ revenue/employee achievable.
column12: SaaS-Agent convergence mandatory 2026. Build AI-native not AI-added. Outcome pricing creates arbitrage opportunity vs subscription models.
column16: Build agent platforms not just SaaS. Outcome-based pricing > subscriptions. Micro-companies viable at scale.

column5: 30 Startup Ideas for 2025 pattern: 99agents (99designs but AI everything $9.99 each) = $100M/year opportunity. Pattern: Take any service business + automate with agents = SaaS margins at service prices. Low price high volume.
column12: Service-to-SaaS via agents = massive opportunity. $9.99 price point at scale. Pattern repeatable across industries.
column16: Service businesses + AI agents = SaaS margins. Low price high volume. 99agents pattern template.

column5: No-Code SaaS truth: YES you can build MVP + get paying users + hit $10K MRR with Supabase + Stripe. NO you wont scale forever - performance costs custom logic will choke you. Key insight: No-code = fastest path to revenue. Code = only path to scale.
column12: No-code MVP then migrate to code. Speed vs scale tradeoff clearly articulated. Validation vs scale.
column16: No-code for $0-$10K MRR validation. Migrate to code when scaling. Dont over-engineer early.

column5: Mercor scaled $1M to $100M ARR in 11 months = fastest growing company in world. 41% monthly growth 2024 then 55% January 87% February. Profited $1M+ last month. NO SALES TEAM - only founders do sales. All growth organic word-of-mouth referrals.
column12: Fastest company growth ever documented. No sales team to $100M ARR. AI hiring platform. Word of mouth only.
